steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the consequence shown: “if the water is too deep, the buoyancy of the young wild-rice plants can literally uproot them from the lake bottom, destroying them.” This directly reveals that water depth harms the plants. The blank must describe how the plants respond to or are affected by water depth.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Sensitive directly expresses what's needed—plants that are responsive to and negatively affected by water depth. The other three choices either contradict this effect (immune), fail to express the meaning (limited), or miss the context (receptive). That matches choice B — B is correct.
